allow: Bash(cd "F:/python_project/HighDream" && ".venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import pylint; print\(pylint.__version__\)" 2>&1 | head -5; echo "---which pylint---"; which pylint 2>/dev/null; ls ".venv/Scripts/pylint"* 2>/dev/null)
Bash(cd "F:/python_project/HighDream" && ".venv/Scripts/pip.exe" install pylint --quiet 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo "---" && ".venv/Scripts/pylint.exe" --version 2>&1 | head -3)

Bash(cd "F:/python_project/HighDream" && echo '{"tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"F:/python_project/HighDream/config.py"}}' | jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py\) ".venv/Scripts/pylint.exe" "$f";; *\) echo "skip \(not .py\): $f";; esac; } 2>&1 | tail -8; echo "---exit: $?---")

Bash(cd "F:/python_project/HighDream" && which jq; echo "---"; echo '{"tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"F:/python_project/HighDream/app.py"}}' | jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path')
